# Slim Laribi — Digital Marketing & Tracking Expert

Site: https://laribislim.com
Author: Slim Laribi
Expertise: Marketing Analytics, Tracking, MarTech, Customer Intelligence

Description:
Slim Laribi is a digital marketing and tracking expert specializing in server-side tracking, marketing analytics, and MarTech architecture. He helps companies improve marketing performance through reliable data and automation.

Main Topics:
- Marketing analytics
- Server-side tracking
- Google Tag Manager
- GA4 analytics
- Meta Conversion API
- Data-driven marketing
- MarTech architecture
- CRM automation
- Customer Intelligence
